Uses of Class
Dungeon_Classes.DestructibleTile

Packages that use DestructibleTile
Package
Description
Character_Classes
 

  • Uses of DestructibleTile in Character_Classes

    Methods in Character_Classes with parameters of type DestructibleTile
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    PlayableChar.collect(DestructibleTile tile, Floor floor)
    Extracts items or currency value arrays directly out of destructible tile types, updating internal inventory and purging map structures afterwards.
    void
    PlayableChar.openTreasure(DestructibleTile tile)
    Unlocks a treasure tile to distribute environmental asset drops.
